---
title: "About"
---

# About Me

I am a digital marketing professional with a background in SEO, paid media, analytics, and website content management.

I am currently pursuing a Master of Science in Digital Marketing and Analytics at California State Polytechnic University, Pomona.

My experience includes:
- Website management in CMS platforms
- SEO strategy and technical optimization
- Paid media campaign support
- Performance tracking using GA4, Looker Studio, and Google Tag Manager
- Cross-functional collaboration on digital campaigns

My goal is to build digital experiences that improve visibility, user engagement, and measurable business outcomes.
